name: delete_game_object
description: Delete one or more GameObjects from the scene. Supports comma-separated names for batch deletion (e.g. 'Enemy1,Enemy2,Spawner'). Also deletes all children. Undoable via Edit > Undo.

game_object.description: Name of the GameObject to delete, or comma-separated names for batch deletion (e.g. 'Cube,Sphere,Light').
